overview: FiberNMS is a carrier-grade Optical Fiber Network Management System for global telecom operators, ISPs, and infrastructure providers. Built with React, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS, it features a multi-tier SaaS subscription model (BASIC/PROFESSIONAL/ENTERPRISE/ULTRA), real-time monitoring, AI-powered predictive fault detection, GIS map visualization, multi-tenant management, and a comprehensive enterprise feature set with feature gating, billing, and white-labeling.
features: Feature gating system with upgrade CTAs
License key validation with expiry warnings
Plan-aware mock data generation (500 to 500K+ devices)
Interactive GIS map with fiber route visualization
